input_text: Nak pergi check up kat klinik kerajaan kena ambil nombor pukul 5 pagi. Orang kerja macam mana nak buat?
reason: Government clinic requiring 5am number-taking excluding working people.
suggested_rewrite: Klinik kerajaan perlu menawarkan slot temujanji termasuk waktu petang dan hujung minggu untuk memudahkan pekerja.

input_text: My Grab account got hacked and someone used my credit card for multiple rides. Customer service took 2 weeks to respond.
reason: Ride-hailing account hack with credit card fraud and slow customer service response.
suggested_rewrite: Immediately freeze your credit card if your ride-hailing account is hacked. File a police report and contact your bank in addition to the app's support.

input_text: 这个大楼的消防演习从来没有做过。物业说太麻烦了。居民的生命安全被忽视。
reason: Building never conducts fire drills, management dismissing it as too troublesome.
suggested_rewrite: 消防演习是法律要求。向消防部门报告从未进行消防演习的建筑物。

input_text: Setiap kali beli sayur kat supermarket, balik rumah baru perasan dah layu. Diorang letak yang layu di bawah yang segar.
reason: Supermarket hiding wilted vegetables under fresh ones, deceptive merchandising.
suggested_rewrite: Amalan menyembunyikan sayur layu di bawah yang segar adalah tidak beretika. Semak kualiti sebelum membeli dan laporkan amalan buruk kepada pengurusan.

input_text: Tukang masak kantin sekolah tak pakai sarung tangan. Nampak guna tangan kosong pegang makanan. Hygiene fail.
reason: School canteen cook not wearing gloves handling food, hygiene violation.
suggested_rewrite: Penyedia makanan di sekolah wajib mematuhi standard kebersihan termasuk penggunaan sarung tangan. Laporkan pelanggaran kepada pentadbir sekolah.

input_text: The government housing loan interest rate higher than commercial banks. Isn't government supposed to help the rakyat?
reason: Government housing loan interest higher than commercial, contradicting public welfare mandate.
suggested_rewrite: Compare all available housing loan options including government and commercial banks. Treasury Housing Loan rates are reviewed periodically.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தில் அதிகமான கட்டிடங்கள் கட்டப்பட்டுள்ளன ஆனால் பூங்காக்கள் இல்லை. மக்களுக்கு பசுமை இடங்கள் தேவை.
reason: Overdevelopment with no green spaces, need for parks in the city.
suggested_rewrite: நகர திட்டமிடலில் கட்டிடங்களுக்கு இடையே பசுமை இடங்கள் கட்டாயமாக ஒதுக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Jual rumah subsidi kerajaan kat orang asing. Macam mana rakyat yang betul-betul memerlukan nak dapat?
reason: Government subsidized housing sold to foreigners instead of needy locals.
suggested_rewrite: Rumah subsidi kerajaan sepatutnya untuk rakyat yang layak sahaja. Penguatkuasaan syarat kelayakan perlu diperketat.

input_text: Why do Malaysian companies pay fresh graduates so low compared to Singapore? Same qualification, half the pay.
reason: Graduate pay gap between Malaysia and Singapore, brain drain concern.
suggested_rewrite: Competitive graduate salaries are needed to retain talent. Industry should benchmark wages against regional standards to remain attractive to qualified graduates.

input_text: 每到假期医院就缺医生。平时已经不够了，假期更糟糕。患者怎么办？
reason: Hospital doctor shortage worsening during holidays, patient care concern.
suggested_rewrite: 假期期间医院人手安排需要提前规划。增加医疗人员编制是解决长期医生短缺的关键。

input_text: Dah la minyak masak bersubsidi susah nak dapat, yang ada pun quality rendah. Masak goreng pisang pun tak sedap.
reason: Subsidized cooking oil scarce and low quality, affecting food preparation.
suggested_rewrite: Bekalan minyak masak bersubsidi perlu dipastikan mencukupi dan berkualiti. Sistem pengedaran perlu dikaji untuk mengelakkan kekurangan.

input_text: Car insurance renewal every year is a hassle. Price keeps going up but claims process still terrible.
reason: Annual car insurance hassle with rising premiums but poor claims experience.
suggested_rewrite: Compare insurance quotes from multiple providers for best value. Consider filing feedback with BNM if claims processes are unreasonable.

input_text: Kompleks sukan daerah tutup awal pukul 6 petang. Orang kerja habis kerja pukul 6 jugak. Macam mana nak guna?
reason: District sports complex closing at 6pm when workers finish at 6pm, inaccessible timing.
suggested_rewrite: Kompleks sukan awam perlu memanjangkan waktu operasi untuk mengambil kira jadual kerja. Waktu operasi sehingga 10 malam akan lebih praktikal.

input_text: 每次搬到新地区都要重新注册诊所。病历不能转移。浪费时间重复检查。
reason: Medical records not transferable between clinics when moving, redundant checkups.
suggested_rewrite: 电子医疗记录系统可以实现诊所间的病历共享，减少重复检查。马来西亚可以借鉴其他国家的数字健康系统。

input_text: Nak submit borang apa-apa kat jabatan kerajaan mesti ada salinan bercetak 3 set. Zaman digital tapi still photostat.
reason: Government requiring triple printed copies in the digital age.
suggested_rewrite: Jabatan kerajaan perlu menerima dokumen digital. Ini menjimatkan kertas, masa, dan kos sambil meningkatkan kecekapan.

input_text: Weekend farmers market only has organic produce at premium prices. Regular farmers with affordable produce not given space.
reason: Farmers market excluding affordable produce in favor of premium organic only.
suggested_rewrite: Farmers markets should accommodate a range of price points to serve all income levels. Dedicated sections for affordable local produce would increase accessibility.

input_text: Operator telefon kena kerja 24 jam shift tapi cuma dapat gaji minimum. Tekanan mental tinggi tapi tak ada sokongan.
reason: 24-hour shift operators at minimum wage with high stress and no mental health support.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja syif malam berhak mendapat elaun tambahan dan sokongan kesejahteraan mental. Majikan perlu menyediakan program bantuan pekerja.

input_text: 这个城市的公共交通地图太难懂了。游客和新居民根本看不懂怎么搭车。
reason: Confusing public transport map inaccessible to tourists and new residents.
suggested_rewrite: 公共交通地图应该直观易懂。开发多语言数字导航应用可以改善用户体验。

input_text: Kerajaan kata ekonomi berkembang tapi kedai kat taman ni tutup satu demi satu. Rakyat biasa tak rasa pun kemakmuran tu.
reason: Economic growth not felt by ordinary people as local shops close one by one.
suggested_rewrite: Pertumbuhan ekonomi perlu dirasai semua lapisan masyarakat. Program sokongan untuk PKS dan peniaga kecil boleh membantu ekonomi tempatan.

input_text: முதியோர் இல்லங்களின் நிலை மிகவும் மோசம். போதுமான ஊழியர்கள் இல்லை. முதியவர்கள் அவதிப்படுகிறார்கள்.
reason: Poor conditions in old folks' homes with insufficient staff, elderly suffering.
suggested_rewrite: முதியோர் இல்லங்கள் போதுமான ஊழியர்கள் மற்றும் வசதிகளுடன் இருக்க வேண்டும். சமூக நலத்துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Nak guna fasiliti sukan sekolah masa cuti pun tak boleh. Padahal duit rakyat yang buat. Kunci je kerja diorang.
reason: School sports facilities locked during holidays despite being publicly funded.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan sukan sekolah boleh dibuka untuk kegunaan komuniti semasa cuti dengan pengawasan yang sewajarnya. Cadangan boleh dikemukakan kepada PPD.

input_text: Renovation next door going on for 6 months. Noise every day from 8am. Weekend also no peace. How long must we suffer?
reason: Six-month renovation noise including weekends, quality of life impact.
suggested_rewrite: Extended renovation projects should follow local noise bylaws with restricted hours. Check if the renovation has proper permits and report violations to PBT.

input_text: Gaji budak delivery rider RM1500 tapi kena guna motor sendiri, minyak sendiri, insurance sendiri. Bersih bersih berapa je?
reason: Delivery rider's take-home pay after self-funded expenses barely viable.
suggested_rewrite: Gig economy riders perlu perlindungan yang lebih baik termasuk insurans dan elaun operasi. Dasar gig economy yang komprehensif diperlukan.

input_text: 这个公共体育馆的篮球场地面已经裂开了。打球容易扭伤脚踝。
reason: Public sports hall basketball court with cracked surface causing injury risk.
suggested_rewrite: 体育馆地面裂缝是运动伤害风险。向体育馆管理层报告并要求在修复前关闭该区域。

input_text: Semua benda kat Malaysia boleh settle dengan 'kabel'. Orang biasa yang follow rules je yang suffer.
reason: Perception that connections ('kabel') override rules, frustration with corruption culture.
suggested_rewrite: Budaya kronisme dan rasuah perlu diperangi melalui penguatkuasaan yang lebih ketat dan saluran aduan yang selamat seperti SPRM.

input_text: Tuition center charge RM500 a month per subject. 5 subjects means RM2500. How can average families afford this?
reason: Tuition costs prohibitive for average families at RM2500/month for 5 subjects.
suggested_rewrite: Tuition costs are a significant burden. Explore free online learning resources and government study programs as alternatives to expensive private tuition.

input_text: Nak buat lesen penjaja pun kena tunggu 6 bulan. Orang nak cari makan halal tapi kerajaan buat susah.
reason: 6-month wait for hawker license preventing people from earning a living.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pengeluaran lesen penjaja perlu dipermudahkan dan dipercepatkan supaya rakyat boleh memulakan perniagaan tanpa kelewatan yang tidak perlu.
